description: AppRunner.run(config_file) called on line 23 but AppRunner is never imported — will raise NameError at runtime. Wiring runner module (src/wiring/runner.py) does define AppRunner but main.py has no import statement for it. Verified via grep: zero matches for 'from wiring' or 'import.*AppRunner' in main.py.
proposed_fix: Add 'from wiring.runner import AppRunner' to main.py imports (after line 10 with other imports)

description: ICommunicationGateway protocol defines only health_check() but FabricHealthEndpoints (fabric_health.py:55-59) calls self.gateway.liveness_check() and self.gateway.readiness_check(), and RemoteGatewayAdapter (.docs/remote_adapter.py:50-51) implements them outside the protocol. Structural subtyping will not enforce these methods.
proposed_fix: Add 'async def liveness_check() -> Dict[str, Any]: ...' and 'async def readiness_check() -> Dict[str, Any]: ...' to the ICommunicationGateway Protocol class

description: Import statement 'from contracts.communication_gateway import ICommunicationGateway' will fail with ImportError because no src/contracts/ directory exists. The actual module is at src/wiring/contracts/communication_gateway.py. This is a blocking import error preventing FabricHealthEndpoints from loading.
proposed_fix: Change import to 'from wiring.contracts.communication_gateway import ICommunicationGateway'
